variants.sitewide: Illustrations on this launch site are created artwork unless stated otherwise and do not depict real participants.

notices.title: Service area and venue note
notices.text: The service area anchor is Rochdale. Specific venue details can be shared on enquiry where appropriate.

notices.title: Short-form privacy note
notices.text: We use the details you share only to reply or route your enquiry to the right next step.
